fields.label: Script type
fields.rationale: DocType Event is the common case: hook into Before Save / After Save / On Submit / etc. API exposes a whitelisted endpoint. Scheduler Event runs on a cron cadence. Permission Query filters rows at the query layer.

fields.label: Target DocType (for DocType Event / Permission Query)
fields.rationale: Required when script_type is DocType Event or Permission Query. Names the target. Empty for API or Scheduler scripts.

fields.label: Event (for DocType Event)
fields.rationale: Before Save runs on every save attempt - use to throw() and cancel the save. On Submit fires only on 0->1 docstatus transition. On Trash covers deletes. Each event has a specific semantic; read the Frappe docs before picking.

fields.label: Script body
fields.rationale: RestrictedPython. NO `import` statements - the deploy dry-run rejects any script containing `import`. Use pre-bound `frappe`, `frappe.utils`, `frappe.db`, `json`, `datetime` directly. Start with a frappe.has_permission check before reading or mutating doc state.

fields.label: Disabled
fields.rationale: Default to enabled. Use only when staging a script for later activation.
